content.problemStatement: Complete the given function which reverses the original array using pointers.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contain a single integer $N$ - the size of the input array.
- Next line contains $N$ space separated integers - the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: - Output $N$ space separated integers - the reversed array.
